title: CSX completes data modernization program with Infosys and Microsoft
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the successful completion of a major data modernization program for CSX Corporation using Infosys Topaz, Microsoft Fabric and Microsoft Purview. Infosys led the end-to-end modernization, consolidating CSX's fragmented data landscape into a unified cloud-native, governed data platform. The program replaced legacy systems, enabled automated metadata governance across 28 domains, created 170+ data products, and consolidated over 50,000 legacy reports into 1,200 actionable insights. The document states that CSX achieved significant annual infrastructure savings and established a foundation for predictive analytics, logistics optimization and enterprise-wide operational intelligence.
